column1: # Three overnight data-gen configs for distill-soft experiments.
# Each line: depth  multipv  T  n_games  seed
# Estimated cost on c7i.8xlarge spot (32 vCPU, ~$0.34/h):
#   d10 mpv8 T=1.0  g4000  ~30 min  ~$0.17  (baseline; reproduces 02c)
#   d15 mpv8 T=1.0  g4000  ~3 h     ~$1.00  (depth-15 teacher; Exp C)
#   d10 mpv8 T=0.3  g4000  ~30 min  ~$0.17  (sharper softmax; Exp B)
